creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Created attachment 145801
option for Zippy

There exists a config option (--enable-zippy)
---SCHNIPP--- zippy.README
Zippy is a program that lets GNU Chess act as a computer player on an
Internet Chess Server.  It also works with Crafty.  Zippy is
unsupported, experimental code.
[…]
---schnapp---

I have created a patch which adds an option (ZIPPY) to enable it—thereby leading to setting the configure switch and adding the file zippy.README to the PORTDOCS list and altering info and manual page to mention it.

(don’t forget ‘-p’ when patching as ‘files/’ does not exist yet—i.e.
‘patch -p < patch-option_ZIPPY.txt’ in ‘games/xboard/’).

I hope, it is OK.

ru, Kalten
